forbidden_changes: Do not add global survival bonus without progress gating
Do not only scale all coefficients
Do not treat partial_progress as success_like
Do not construct preference pairs from weak memory
required_changes: Restructure stability_near component to be less punitive for non-terminal partial-progress trajectories; consider gating by distance threshold
Strengthen terminal_bonus to be achievable with moderate speeds and both legs contact, reducing strictness of crash criteria
Preserve progress-conditioned gating for approach_progress and stability_near
Reduce terminal_penalty severity for non-crash partial-progress terminations
Explore mechanisms to reduce ambiguous trajectory proportion, e.g., clearer terminal event handling

expected_effect: Separate progress, stability, and terminal terms based on analyzer intent.
risk: Delta terms may be noisy if the progress proxy is imperfect.
